TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Antony_Alda, title = Antony_Alda, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Antony_Alda} }

S.FORM: kawas tay 1956, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 12, Antony Alda, biru na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2009) mintzyuwaw nya Antony Alda hiya ga m'engi. t'aring sa kawas 1990, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na engi ru mqwas. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Antony Alda htgan na ryax maki D'Abruzzo in St. Julie. Flora Martino hiya' ga, yaya' ni Antony. Flora hiya ga m'engi. Antony maki tay kawas 1975 msqun ki Leslie Clark, maki tay kawas 1977 t'alax. Antony maki tay kawas 1981 msqun ki Lori Carrell, maki tay kawas 1992 t'alax. Antony hiya ga maki 2 la'iy. pinqbaqan nya Antony Alda tmasuq mqwas biru sa Notre Dame International pqwsan biru seneng. Antony Alda tmasuq mqwas biru sa Juilliard pqwasan biru (The Juilliard School) sa New York City. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors

kawas tay 1956, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 12, Antony Alda, biru na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2009) mintzyuwaw nya Antony Alda hiya ga m'engi. t'aring sa kawas 1990, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na engi ru mqwas. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Antony Alda htgan na ryax maki D'Abruzzo in St. Julie. Flora Martino hiya' ga, yaya' ni Antony. Flora hiya ga m'engi. Antony maki tay kawas 1975 msqun ki Leslie Clark, maki tay kawas 1977 t'alax. Antony maki tay kawas 1981 msqun ki Lori Carrell, maki tay kawas 1992 t'alax. Antony hiya ga maki 2 la'iy. pinqbaqan nya Antony Alda tmasuq mqwas biru sa Notre Dame International pqwsan biru seneng. Antony Alda tmasuq mqwas biru sa Juilliard pqwasan biru (The Juilliard School) sa New York City. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, antonj al*a, βiru na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mintzjuwaw nja antonj al*a ħija ɣa mʔeŋi. tʔariŋ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na eŋi ru mqwas~ɕ. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) antonj al*a ħtɣan na rjax maki *ʔaβruzzo in s~ɕt. *ulie. *lora martino ħijaʔ ɣa, jajaʔ ni antonj. *lora ħija ɣa mʔeŋi. antonj maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki les~ɕlie ʦ~ʨlark, maki taj kawas~ɕ **** tʔalax. antonj maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki lori ʦ~ʨarrell, maki taj kawas~ɕ **** tʔalax. antonj ħija ɣa maki * laʔij. pinqβaqan nja antonj al*a tmas~ɕuq mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa notre *ame international pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ. antonj al*a tmas~ɕuq mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa *uilliar* pqwas~ɕan βiru (tħe *uilliar* s~ɕʦ~ʨħool) s~ɕa new jork ʦ~ʨitj. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
